creator: sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	kde2
#	kde2/Makefile
#	kde2/pkg-comment
#	kde2/pkg-descr
#	kde2/pkg-plist
#	kdeaddons
#	kdeaddons/Makefile
#	kdeaddons/distinfo
#	kdebase2
#	kdebase2/Makefile
#	kdebase2/distinfo
#	kdelibs2
#	kdelibs2/Makefile
#	kdelibs2/distinfo
#	kdenetwork2
#	kdenetwork2/Makefile
#	kdenetwork2/distinfo
#	kdevelop
#	kdevelop/Makefile
#	kdevelop/distinfo
#	qt23
#	qt23/Makefile
#	qt23/distinfo
#
echo c - kde2
mkdir -p kde2 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - kde2/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >kde2/Makefile << 'END-of-kde2/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	Japanized KDE2
X# Date created:		28 August 2001
X# Whom:			SASAKI Katuhiro <sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	kde
XPORTVERSION=	2.2
XCATEGORIES=	japanese x11 kde
XMASTER_SITES=	# empty
XDISTFILES=	# none
XEXTRACT_ONLY=	# empty
X
XMAINTAINER=	sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	qt2.4:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/qt23 \
X		kdecore.4:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/kdelibs2 \
X		konq.4:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/kdebase2
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=	kppp:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/kdenetwork2 \
X		dcop_kate:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/kdeaddons \
X		${LOCALBASE}/share/locale/ja/entry.desktop:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/kde2-i18n
X
XNO_BUILD=	yes
X
Xdo-install:	# empty
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-kde2/Makefile
echo x - kde2/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >kde2/pkg-comment << 'END-of-kde2/pkg-comment'
XThe "meta-port" for Japanized KDE 2
END-of-kde2/pkg-comment
echo x - kde2/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >kde2/pkg-descr << 'END-of-kde2/pkg-descr'
XThis is "meta-port" for Japanized KDE version 2 desktop environment.
XJapanization is done by applying patches distributed by JKUG.
X
XUse this port before using /usr/ports/x11/kde2.
XUse the packages from this port after the original packages.
X
XWWW: http://www.kde.gr.jp/patch/
END-of-kde2/pkg-descr
echo x - kde2/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >kde2/pkg-plist << 'END-of-kde2/pkg-plist'
X@comment this plist intentionally left empty
END-of-kde2/pkg-plist
echo c - kdeaddons
mkdir -p kdeaddons > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - kdeaddons/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >kdeaddons/Makefile << 'END-of-kdeaddons/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	Japanized addons for kde
X# Date created:		28 August 2001
X# Whom:			SASAKI Katuhiro <sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
X# This port does not work with another version of master port.
X#PORTVERSION=	2.2
XCATEGORIES=	japanese misc
X
XMASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../misc/kdeaddons
XMD5_FILE=	${.CURDIR}/distinfo
X
XMAINTAINER=	sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp
X
XPATCH_SITES=	http://www.kde.gr.jp/patch/
XPATCHFILES=	kdeaddons-2.2-babelfish-ja-20010816.diff
XPATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
X
X.include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"
END-of-kdeaddons/Makefile
echo x - kdeaddons/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >kdeaddons/distinfo << 'END-of-kdeaddons/distinfo'
XMD5 (kdeaddons-2.2.tar.bz2) = 3c3d40e8d3e8de02ced840ccf7944790
XMD5 (kdeaddons-2.2-babelfish-ja-20010816.diff) = 2f0683f5d2895728dead7c0810a42f0f
END-of-kdeaddons/distinfo
echo c - kdebase2
mkdir -p kdebase2 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - kdebase2/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >kdebase2/Makefile << 'END-of-kdebase2/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	Japanized kdebase2
X# Date created:		28 August 2001
X# Whom:			SASAKI Katuhiro <sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
X# This port does not work with another version of master port.
X#PORTVERSION=	2.2
XCATEGORIES=	japanese x11 kde
X
XMASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../x11/kdebase2
XMD5_FILE=	${.CURDIR}/distinfo
X
XMAINTAINER=	sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp
X
XPATCH_SITES=	http://www.kde.gr.jp/patch/
XPATCHFILES=	kdebase-2.2-konsole-ja-20010818.diff \
X		kdebase-2.2-kpersonalizer-charset-20010816.diff
XPATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
X
X.include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"
END-of-kdebase2/Makefile
echo x - kdebase2/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >kdebase2/distinfo << 'END-of-kdebase2/distinfo'
XMD5 (kdebase-2.2.tar.bz2) = 15e0232aa73029ac10346157b6eb079b
XMD5 (kdebase-2.2-konsole-ja-20010818.diff) = d802336be4c9738a50a5b3b1b9206383
XMD5 (kdebase-2.2-kpersonalizer-charset-20010816.diff) = a272f06a37d44434859864fc3599d959
END-of-kdebase2/distinfo
echo c - kdelibs2
mkdir -p kdelibs2 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - kdelibs2/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >kdelibs2/Makefile << 'END-of-kdelibs2/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	Japanized KDE libraries 2
X# Date created:		28 August 2001
X# Whom:			SASAKI Katuhiro <sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
X# This port does not work with another version of master port.
X#PORTVERSION=	2.2
XCATEGORIES=	japanese x11 kde
X
XMASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../x11/kdelibs2
XMD5_FILE=	${.CURDIR}/distinfo
X
XMAINTAINER=	sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp
X
XPATCH_SITES=	http://www.kde.gr.jp/patch/
XPATCHFILES=	kdelibs-2.2-keditcl-20010816.diff \
X		kdelibs-2.2-khtml-autoencode-ja-20010816.diff
XPATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
X
X.include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"
END-of-kdelibs2/Makefile
echo x - kdelibs2/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >kdelibs2/distinfo << 'END-of-kdelibs2/distinfo'
XMD5 (kdelibs-2.2.tar.bz2) = 2aca0c00143f4f7bc1ee7afdbe892912
XMD5 (kdelibs-2.2-keditcl-20010816.diff) = 06f6f79f2756051841cd0445e9210fb4
XMD5 (kdelibs-2.2-khtml-autoencode-ja-20010816.diff) = 369f7832be3f32d0f8a6847438d79e4c
END-of-kdelibs2/distinfo
echo c - kdenetwork2
mkdir -p kdenetwork2 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - kdenetwork2/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >kdenetwork2/Makefile << 'END-of-kdenetwork2/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	Japanized kdenetwork2
X# Date created:		28 August 2001
X# Whom:			SASAKI Katuhiro <sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
X# This port does not work with another version of master port.
X#PORTVERSION=	2.2
XCATEGORIES=	japanese net news kde
X
XMASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../net/kdenetwork2
XMD5_FILE=	${.CURDIR}/distinfo
X
XMAINTAINER=	sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp
X
XPATCH_SITES=	http://www.kde.gr.jp/patch/
XPATCHFILES=	kdenetwork-2.2-kmail-honyaku-20010818.diff \
X		kdenetwork-2.2-kmail-unknowncharset-cjk-20010816.diff \
X		kdenetwork-2.2-kmail-show_userAgent-20010825.diff \
X		kdenetwork-2.2-knewsticker-utf8-20010816.diff \
X		kdenetwork-2.2-ksirc-ja-20010816.diff
XPATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
X
X.include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"
END-of-kdenetwork2/Makefile
echo x - kdenetwork2/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >kdenetwork2/distinfo << 'END-of-kdenetwork2/distinfo'
XMD5 (kdenetwork-2.2.tar.bz2) = 8b83592546aa96ce69fb80dffde32f68
XMD5 (kdenetwork-2.2-kmail-honyaku-20010818.diff) = 67ec77a5dcc76f879adc52593a26367a
XMD5 (kdenetwork-2.2-kmail-unknowncharset-cjk-20010816.diff) = f9d9b46b72a2e6cc0a7faea64570ca16
XMD5 (kdenetwork-2.2-kmail-show_userAgent-20010825.diff) = 1d5f1899cc516942586843400e5d8016
XMD5 (kdenetwork-2.2-knewsticker-utf8-20010816.diff) = 3f7da77f870f6504f8d3e18215f825d6
XMD5 (kdenetwork-2.2-ksirc-ja-20010816.diff) = fd70a64dadb78f5c39e1d270e666aa29
END-of-kdenetwork2/distinfo
echo c - kdevelop
mkdir -p kdevelop > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - kdevelop/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >kdevelop/Makefile << 'END-of-kdevelop/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	Japanized kdevelop
X# Date created:		28 August 2001
X# Whom:			SASAKI Katuhiro <sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
X# This port does not work with another version of master port.
X#PORTVERSION=	2.0
XCATEGORIES=	japanese devel kde
X
XMASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../devel/kdevelop
XMD5_FILE=	${.CURDIR}/distinfo
X
XMAINTAINER=	sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp
X
XPATCH_SITES=	http://www.kde.gr.jp/patch/
XPATCHFILES=	kdevelop-2.0-font-i18n-20010816.diff \
X		kdevelop-2.0-i18n-20010817.diff
XPATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
X
X.include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"
END-of-kdevelop/Makefile
echo x - kdevelop/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >kdevelop/distinfo << 'END-of-kdevelop/distinfo'
XMD5 (kdevelop-2.0.tar.bz2) = 3b830fcc95050fe7789ae299802f6f74
XMD5 (kdevelop-2.0-font-i18n-20010816.diff) = 930cec996b3e8da4b5720cfd9d680ac3
XMD5 (kdevelop-2.0-i18n-20010817.diff) = 91fe5f99d4fc85f290560843df5f33f0
END-of-kdevelop/distinfo
echo c - qt23
mkdir -p qt23 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - qt23/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >qt23/Makefile << 'END-of-qt23/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	Japanized qt23
X# Date created:		28 August 2001
X# Whom:			SASAKI Katuhiro <sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
X# This port does not work with another version of master port.
X#PORTVERSION=	2.3.1
XCATEGORIES=	japanese x11-toolkits
X
XMASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../x11-toolkits/qt23
XMD5_FILE=	${.CURDIR}/distinfo
X
XMAINTAINER=	sahiro@crest.ocn.ne.jp
X
XPATCH_SITES=	http://www.kde.gr.jp/patch/
XPATCHFILES=	qt-2.3.1-qclipboard-20010617.diff \
X		qt-2.3.1-qpsprinter-ja-20010620.diff \
X		qt-2.3.1-qstring-toDouble-i18n-20010617.diff \
X		qt-2.3.1-showFullScreen-fix-20010624.diff \
X		qt-2.3.1-xim-20010617.diff
XPATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
X
X.include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"
END-of-qt23/Makefile
echo x - qt23/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >qt23/distinfo << 'END-of-qt23/distinfo'
XMD5 (qt-x11-2.3.1.tar.gz) = 358d6dfbcbdc353b65b5236866b0f3a7
XMD5 (qt-2.3.1-qclipboard-20010617.diff) = c9969ca881e6e86174c4a848ce105a5d
XMD5 (qt-2.3.1-qpsprinter-ja-20010620.diff) = 8062eac74e4b88f0b5d9c92a305f8bb1
XMD5 (qt-2.3.1-qstring-toDouble-i18n-20010617.diff) = 2275288d894914cc0785b1553d17cfb7
XMD5 (qt-2.3.1-showFullScreen-fix-20010624.diff) = 388329bbe2e6aa9c1dc29342081f4da1
XMD5 (qt-2.3.1-xim-20010617.diff) = 28c02a3ec4cd430ba62773981854195b
END-of-qt23/distinfo
exit
